member.name: T:LostFilmTV.Client.Exceptions.RemoteServiceUnavailableException
member.summary: RemoteServiceUnavailableException.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:LostFilmTV.Client.Exceptions.RemoteServiceUnavailableException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:LostFilmTV.Client.Exceptions.RemoteServiceUnavailableException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:LostFilmTV.Client.LostFilmClient
member.summary: Client for LostFilm.TV This class is responsible for all interactions with lostfilm.tv website.

member.name: M:LostFilmTV.Client.LostFilmClient.#ctor(LostFilmMonitoring.Common.ILogger,System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:LostFilmTV.Client.LostFilmClient.DownloadTorrentFileAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get torrent file for user.
member.returns: TorrentFile object which contain file name and content stream.

member.name: T:LostFilmTV.Client.Response.ReteOrgFeedItemResponse
member.summary: FeedItemResponse.

member.name: M:LostFilmTV.Client.Response.ReteOrgFeedItemResponse.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. This constructor is required for JSON deserializer.

member.name: M:LostFilmTV.Client.Response.ReteOrgFeedItemResponse.TryParseFromXElement(System.Xml.Linq.XElement,LostFilmTV.Client.Response.ReteOrgFeedItemResponse@,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Try to parse an RSS item XElement into a strongly-typed feed item. Returns true on success and sets ; returns false and logs when parsing fails.
member.returns: True if parsing succeeded; false if parsing failed and the item should be skipped.
member.param: Parsed result if successful; otherwise null.
Optional logger action to receive diagnostics when parsing fails.

member.name: M:LostFilmTV.Client.Response.ReteOrgFeedItemResponse.TryParseSeriesNames(System.String,System.String@,System.String@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Extracts the Russian and English series names and returns the index immediately after the title separator so episode parsing can begin.
member.example: Input: "Внешние сферы (Outer Range). Неведомое (S01E07) [MP4]" Output: seriesNameRu="Внешние сферы", seriesNameEn="Outer Range", episodeStartIndex points to the first non-whitespace character after ".".

member.name: M:LostFilmTV.Client.Response.ReteOrgFeedItemResponse.TryParseEpisodeDetails(System.String,System.Int32,System.String@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Extracts episode name, season and episode numbers, and returns the index where optional quality information begins.
member.example: Input (startIndex points at "Неведомое ..."): "Неведомое (S01E07) [MP4]" Output: episodeName="Неведомое", seasonNumber=1, episodeNumber=7, qualityStartIndex points to the space before "[MP4]".

member.name: M:LostFilmTV.Client.Response.ReteOrgFeedItemResponse.TryParseQuality(System.String,System.Int32,System.String@)
member.summary: Parses optional quality metadata from the tail of the title.
member.example: Input fragment: "[MP4]" => quality = "MP4" Input fragment: "[1080p]" => quality = "1080".

member.name: T:LostFilmTV.Client.Response.TorrentFileResponse
member.summary: Represents torrent file with content.

member.name: M:LostFilmTV.Client.Response.TorrentFileResponse.#ctor(System.String,System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:LostFilmTV.Client.Response.TorrentFileResponse.FileName
member.summary: Gets File Name.

member.name: P:LostFilmTV.Client.Response.TorrentFileResponse.Content
member.summary: Gets content stream.

member.summary: Gets Logger.

member.summary: Downloads content by URL.
member.param: Additional headers to add for the request to external service.

member.name: M:LostFilmTV.Client.RssFeed.BaseRssFeed.GetItems(System.String)
member.summary: Reads Feed item objects from RSS content.

member.summary: Generages XDocument from input string.

member.summary: ReteOrgRssFeedService.

member.name: M:LostFilmTV.Client.RssFeed.ReteOrgRssFeed.LoadFeedItemsAsync
member.summary: Get FeedItemResponse from n.retre.org.
